svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="OpenCode" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="app-architecture" name="App Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1637" dy="788" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=30;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#E2E4E6;align=left;" value="InkScroller App Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="520" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111416;strokeColor=#888D93;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=12;" value="Screaming Architecture by feature, Clean Architecture inside each feature." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="600" x="60" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="features" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0D1516;strokeColor=#80D5CB;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="features/ business domains
auth · home · explore · library · reader · preferences · profile · settings · about" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="360" x="60" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="presentation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1A2122;strokeColor=#80D5CB;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=15;" value="Presentation
Pages · Widgets · Riverpod providers · StateNotifier · immutable state" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="500" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="domain" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#242B2C;strokeColor=#F4C95D;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Domain
Entities · Repository contracts · Use cases
Pure Dart, no Flutter/Dio" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="300" x="500" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="data" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1A2122;strokeColor=#80D5CB;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=15;" value="Data
DTO models · Mappers · Data sources · Repository implementations
Knows JSON/Dio/API" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="300" x="500" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0D1516;strokeColor=#80D5CB;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=15;" value="core/ shared infrastructure
DioClient · AppRouter · get_it initDI · ApiConfig · AppEnvironment · design tokens · l10n · analytics" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="300" x="900" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111416;strokeColor=#888D93;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=15;" value="FastAPI Backend
/manga · /manga/search · /manga/{id} · /chapters · /users/me · /preferences" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="260" x="1280" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="external" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111416;strokeColor=#888D93;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#E2E4E6;fontSize=15;" value="External services
MangaDex · Jikan/MAL · Firebase Auth · Railway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="1280" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="features" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#AEB5B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="presentation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="presentation" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#AEB5B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#E2E4E6;labelBackgroundColor=#0D1516;" target="domain" value="depends on use cases"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#AEB5B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#E2E4E6;labelBackgroundColor=#0D1516;" target="domain" value="interfaces implemented by"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="presentation" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#AEB5B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="core"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#AEB5B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="core"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="core" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#AEB5B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#E2E4E6;labelBackgroundColor=#0D1516;" target="backend" value="HTTP / JSON"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#AEB5B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="external"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
